whatsNew: Added a Reading & Accessibility tile to Settings.
Added Easy Read, dyslexia-friendly text, text-size controls, focus mode and four page-colour overlays.
Added read aloud with adjustable speed, a reading ruler and speech-to-text dictation.
Added native spelling, autocorrect and capitalisation support across written evidence fields.
Accessibility preferences are saved on the learner's device and apply throughout Apprentice+.
